ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition To Approve Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Continued To Jan-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espy, petitioner in pro per.

Ms. Espy stated that she was remiss and did not calendar the status report date. She reported that she is still waiting to hear back from the IRS regarding a tax refund request. The matter was continued to Januray 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, to give Ms. Espy additional time to file her status report.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not reported)
